_notes: Hand-curated by walking the US Core Encounter differential (20 elements) against the R4 Encounter snapshot (73 elements). Verified with PowerShell. Covers: 4 cardinality increases, binding changes (type example->extensible, dischargeDisposition example->preferred), reference profile narrowing to US Core profiles, and MustSupport additions across all constrained elements.

drifts.description: MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Identifier system URI becomes mandatory when an identifier is present. R4 Encounter snapshot does not constrain identifier sub-elements (inherited from Identifier datatype as 0..1).
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Identifier value becomes mandatory when an identifier is present. R4 Encounter snapshot does not constrain identifier sub-elements (inherited as 0..1).
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*]. At least one encounter type becomes mandatory in US Core.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).

Binding changed: R4 uses example strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-type. US Core tightens to extensible strength with http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-encounter-type (US-specific encounter types). Binding strength tightened: example -> extensible.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Subject becomes mandatory; R4 allows an encounter without a subject.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
Reference target profile constrained: R4 allows Reference(Patient|Group). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-patient) only.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Reference target profiles constrained: R4 allows Reference(Practitioner|PractitionerRole|RelatedPerson). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-practitioner|us-core-practitionerrole|us-core-relatedperson).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Reference target profiles constrained to US Core profiles: R4 allows Reference(Condition|Observation|Procedure|ImmunizationRecommendation). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-condition-problems-health-concerns|us-core-condition-encounter-diagnosis|us-core-procedure|Observation|ImmunizationRecommendation).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Binding changed: R4 uses example strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-discharge-disposition. US Core tightens to preferred strength with http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-discharge-disposition (US-specific discharge dispositions). Binding strength tightened: example -> preferred.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Reference target profile constrained: R4 allows Reference(Organization). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-organization).
